title: Maju Serem Mundur Horor
overview: An Indonesian horror comedy film that tells the story of four film students who are forced to make a horror film for their final project in order to complete their studies. However, mystical events such as ghost sightings and possessions begin to haunt their filming process, disrupting production and the safety of the team.
